positive: Intricate, highly detailed portrait of a celestial creature—a hybrid dragon and unicorn—floating among glowing nebula clouds. The style is dark fantasy mixed with Art Nouveau influences, using deep jewel tones, gold leaf accents, and cosmic elements. Cinematic lighting, volumetric fog, highly detailed scale texture.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, simple drawing
